title: CC narrative review S12a panel a1

payload.notes: S12a (P_B08_0, 'The Audit Gate') delivers its beat essentially verbatim: arrested mid-cheer celebration (hood-grab + frozen confetti), figure-as-room EVAL PIPELINE with AUDIT stamp, magnifier on evaluator, +6.2 held at the glowing gate with its 'HOLD · not a claim' chip — the prettiest number physically stopped before it can become a claim. NARRATIVE-BEAT FIDELITY (5): this is the audit-gate insert between S12's false triumph and S13's mechanism reveal, and it stages exactly that — the executor's celebration intercepted MID-MOTION (caught halfway into a jump, hood gripped, confetti frozen) while the unhurried reviewer presses the magnifier onto the evaluator block; the bubble pair '先过审计门。' / '现在吗？！' lands the celebrate-vs-verify pivot without leaking S13's decomposition. The prior-evidence Tok|yo shard at the pipeline input and DDL T-05:12 keep the audit grounded in continuity. COMPOSITION-STORY (4): reading order duo → magnifier-on-evaluator → gate → held +6.2 card is clean; the half-step deduction is for the dense dashboards-lighting-up background that slightly crowds the eye-path around the pipeline, but the held-at-gate beat stays unambiguous. NARRATIVE VERDICT: PASS on story (no beat-level rejection). Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone / baked-text quality are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini + Codex).
